articles.description: Gary Gensler's time as Chairman of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has officially come to an end. The post Gary Gensler Officially Steps Down as SEC Chairman appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation considers staking its $1B ETH holdings amid criticism and leadership overhaul
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation has been catching flak for just selling ETH to pay the bills instead of exploring staking or DeFi. Now, according to Vitalik Buterin, the foundation is indeed looking into these options, including the possibility of staking approximately $1 billion in ETH holdings.Backlash against Ethereum Foundation has intensified over the past few days due to its lack of engagement...

articles.title: Trump’s Crypto Project Buys Key ENS Domains After $48 Million Ether Buy
articles.description: World Liberty Financial (WLF), Donald Trump’s crypto project, has been making bold moves over the weekend in the crypto world. Within 24 hours, WLF has acquired three Ethereum Name Service (ENS) domains—trumpcoin.eth, erictrump.eth, and barrontrump.eth—and purchased $48 million worth of Ethereum. These developments come hot on the heels of a series of memecoin launches linked […] The post Trump’s Crypto Project Buys Key ENS Domains After $48 Million Ether Buy appeared first on The Coin Republic.

articles.description:
